topic.name: Tax Credits and Financial Incentives

topic.name: Data Privacy and Security Legislation
topic.description: This cluster of documents discusses various legislative measures aimed at enhancing data privacy, security, and accountability regarding personally identifiable information and data breaches.

Document 3: provides criminal penalties for intentional failures to provide required notices of a security breach involving sensitive personally identifiable information

Document 4: imposes a fine and/or prison term of up to five years for intentionally or willfully concealing a security breach involving sensitive personally identifiable information

makes it unlawful for a service provider to knowingly or intentionally redirect web searches or otherwise monitor, manipulate, aggregate, and market data from websites without the consent of the Internet user
Document 5: requires any federal agency or business entity engaged in interstate commerce that uses, accesses, transmits, stores, disposes of, or collects sensitive personally identifiable information to notify U.S. residents following the discovery of a security breach

topic.name: Campaign Finance Reform
topic.description: The documents focus on various legislative efforts aimed at reforming campaign finance laws to enhance transparency, limit contributions, and promote public funding of elections.

Document 5: Amends Internal Revenue Code provisions relating to public financing of presidential election campaigns to quadruple the matching rate for contributions to primary election candidates
